conclusions.fixed_order_six: every consecutive-row arbitrary-column reshaped-Hankel minor through order six has its required sign on -100<=lambda<=0
conclusions.next_handoff: derive a cancellation-preserving contiguous order-seven entry coordinate and flow reduction

proof_boundary: This artifact proves the required signed Hankel layer through fixed order six only. It does not prove order seven or higher, PF-infinity, the all-degree Jensen bridge, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: Every signed order-six endpoint coordinate is strictly positive at lambda=-100.
Signed order-six positivity is uniform at sufficiently large shift throughout the compact heat interval.
rows.formula: there exists N_6 such that Q_(6,n)(lambda)=-H_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N_6 and -100<=lambda<=0

rows.claim: The signed order-six layer obeys a nearest-neighbor cooperative system with positive forward coefficient.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact Plucker and heat-flow algebra inside the completed order-five cone.

rows.claim: The uniform tail confines any first loss to finitely many shifts, where variation of constants preserves positivity.
rows.proof_boundary: Infinite-index maximum principle with compact-uniform tail.

rows.claim: The endpoint, uniform tail, and cooperative system prove signed contiguous order six throughout the interval.
rows.proof_boundary: All shifts and all finite heat parameters from -100 through zero.

rows.claim: The completed lower contiguous layers supply every initial-minor sign through order five.
rows.formula: epsilon_k*H_(k,n)(lambda)>0 for k=1,2,3,4,5, all n and -100<=lambda<=0

rows.claim: The fixed-order initial-minor criterion transfers signed contiguous order six to all arbitrary column sets.
rows.proof_boundary: Finite-dimensional transfer applied pointwise in lambda.

rows.claim: The fixed-order programme now hands off to a genuinely new contiguous order-seven layer.
rows.formula: derive a cancellation-preserving contiguous order-seven entry coordinate and flow reduction
rows.proof_boundary: Open order-seven analytic problem; not PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.

source_contract.conditional_forward: [Q_(6,n)(-100)>0 for all n] => [Q_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for all n and -100<=lambda<=0]
source_contract.fixed_order_transfer: [epsilon_k H_(k,s)>0 for 1<=k<=m, all s] => [epsilon_k R_(k,n)(j_1,...,j_k)>0 for 1<=k<=m]
source_contract.lower_layers: epsilon_k*H_(k,n)(lambda)>0 for k=1,2,3,4,5, all n and -100<=lambda<=0
source_contract.uniform_tail: there exists N_6 such that Q_(6,n)(lambda)=-H_(6,n)(lambda)>0 for every n>=N_6 and -100<=lambda<=0

status: signed contiguous and arbitrary-column order-six theorem on -100<=lambda<=0
